name: Jeanette's Strawberry Jello Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in 1/4 cup water.
2. Dissolve the softened gelatin and 2 packages of strawberry jello in 2 cups boiling water.
3. Add 1 large or 2 small frozen strawberries, 1 small can crushed strawberries, and 1 cup fine chopped nuts (if using).
4. Combine well.
5. Pour half of the jello mixture into the mold and chill until firm.
6. Spread the filling over the jello and pour the remaining jello on top.
7. Allow to set very firmly before serving, ideally overnight.
8. If needed, serve directly from the bowl when entertaining non-family members.
Note: The original recipe was attempted by Jeanette's daughter, who disliked the nuts, so they were left out. However, if you wish to include them, feel free to do so.
